label: New results
title: ARML 2026
description: American Regions Mathematics League 2026 individual results are now available on mathintegrity.org — top 72 finishers with scores and tiebreak data.

label: Happening now
title: American Masters of Mathematics — live in Denver
description: While you're reading this, somewhere in Denver a kid is staring at an integral that just stared back. AMM is in session right now — IMO coaches and medalists wrote the problems, and the country's strongest grade 10–12 students are currently regretting all life decisions that led them here. Pray for them. Or, you know, root for them.

label: New results
title: BMT 2024 & JHMT 2025–2026
description: Berkeley Math Tournament 2024 and Johns Hopkins Math Tournament 2025 and 2026 results are now available on mathintegrity.org. MathIntegrity has reached the milestone of more than 10,000 competition records.
